en: Reservation service or a travel agent.
Well, I booked it directly through you.
I've already also paid a deposit on the first night
I have a reservation number if that helps.
ko: 예약 번호가 있는데 도움이 될까요? 네, 물론이죠. 보여주시겠어요?

en: Yeah. Sure. Can I see that please?
Thank you. Oh
I see
Maybe there was a glitch with the booking system
Well, we don't have any more single rooms available with the exception of one adjoined room
ko: 싱글룸은 더 이상 없는데 연결된 방 하나가 있어요.

en: But you would then be right next door to a family with children which might get noisy, but that's not a problem
ko: 하지만 아이가 있는 가족 옆방이라 시끄러울 수 있어요. 하지만 문제 없어요.

en: I can upgrade you to one of our business suites.
ko: 비즈니스 스위트로 업그레이드해 드릴 수 있어요.

en: They all come with jacuzzis. Oh, that sounds nice
But how much more is that going to cost?
That would of course be at no extra charge to you.
Oh, thank you. My pleasure
What about the wireless Internet? Oh, it's really easy
ko: 무선 인터넷은 어떻게 해요? 아, 정말 쉬워요.

en: This is your access code and instructions on how to use it
ko: 이게 접속 코드와 사용 방법 안내입니다.

en: If you have any problems, feel free to call the front desk
ko: 문제가 있으시면 언제든지 프런트 데스크에 전화해 주세요.

en: And this is a list of all the hotel amenities like the gym in the indoor pool.
ko: 그리고 이건 실내 수영장과 체육관 같은 호텔 시설 목록이에요.

en: Thank you very much
You're welcome. Has the valet already taken your car or will you be needing?
ko: 천만에요. 발렛이 이미 차를 가져갔나요, 아니면 필요하신가요?
